summary: Read the requested local improvement-plan markdown file, verified SHA-256 matched the expected value, and analyzed implementation order, scope control, dependencies, breadth risk, and first implementation step. No target/source files were edited.
decisions: Treat the plan as a final-readiness specification, not an immediately executable sprint backlog.
Recommend starting with P0-02 status freshness because stale monitoring undermines all later gates and is already first in the plan's own sequence.
Recommend limiting the first implementation slice to freshness metadata, status precedence, needs_refresh semantics, API/UI visibility, and focused tests only.
Identify the plan as too broad for one implementation wave; split P0 safety/freshness gates, live backlog cleanup, release/sync E2E, UI proof, and outcome metrics into separate milestones.
next_steps: If implementing, inspect current monitoring, health, and client MCP diagnostics modules plus existing tests before editing.
Create or update a focused P0-02 test fixture showing newer direct MCP proof overriding stale monitoring snapshots.
Only after P0-02 passes, proceed to P0-04 direct MCP parity canary and P0-03 recovery-key polarity cleanup.
